field_values.action_summary: After reaching the shore, the group realizes the Scarecrow is gone. A passing Stork arrives and offers assistance. The Stork flies out to the middle of the river, retrieves the Scarecrow from his pole, and delivers him safely back to the group on the bank.
field_values.camera_intent: Low angle shots of group looking defeated on riverbank; Tracking shot following stork flight path; Wide shot showing scale of stork carrying scarecrow; Medium reaction shots of group receiving scarecrow
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Stork height and physical scale relative to characters
Physical handling/grip of the_scarecrow during mid-air retrieval
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH008_SC002

## Production Intent
Establish the sudden arrival of a stork to resolve the loss of the scarecrow via mid-air retrieval. The sequence must emphasize the scale difference between the avian savior and the characters on the bank, transitioning from heavy despair to wonder.

## Required Cast
- dorothy
- toto
- the_scarecrow
- tin_woodman
- cowardly_lion
- stork

## Required Environments
- swift_river_crossing (grassy bank and river current)

## Continuity Constraints
- Stork height/scale relative to characters.
- Physical handling of the_scarecrow during mid-air retrieval from his pole.

## Beat List
- BT001: Group realizes the_scarecrow is missing.
- BT002: Stork retrieves the_scarecrow from the river center.
- BT003: Stork delivers the_scarecrow safely back to the bank.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity

evidence_summary: Resolve the immediate crisis of the lost companion through a "deus ex machina" moment.

After reaching the shore, the group realizes the Scarecrow is gone. A passing Stork arrives and offers assistance. The Stork flies out to the middle of the river, retrieves the Scarecrow from his pole, and delivers him safely back to the group on the bank.

Establish the sudden arrival of a stork to resolve the loss of the scarecrow via mid-air retrieval. The sequence must emphasize the scale difference between the avian savior and the characters on the bank, transitioning from heavy despair to wonder.
